comments.body: This has nothing to do with flyway, is all about JDK.

answers.body:
class file has wrong version 61.0, should be 55.0

I assume that your project is running on Java 11 but the version of Flyway expects at least Java 17 probably. You can either downgrade Flyway to align with Java 11, or you can upgrade your microservice to Java 17

Supported Java Versions Java JDK 17+

https://documentation.red-gate.com/fd/api-java-277579358.html

Deprecated Java 8. Java 17 is now required for development.

https://www.componentsource.com/product/flyway/releases/2800006

title: Troubleshooting Flyway dep upgrade 8.5.13 -> 11.3.4 (Spring)
body:
I get this CI/CD error after I updated the POM file to a newer version:

Failed to execute goal org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-compiler-plugin:3.8.1:compile (default-compile) on project redacted: Compilation failure: Compilation failure:
[ERROR] /builds/ZHxiFWMPd/0/redacted/support/redacted/src/main/java/redacted/redacted/redacted/redacted/config/FlywayMigrationStrategyImpl.java:[3,25] cannot access org.flywaydb.core.Flyway
[ERROR]   bad class file: /builds/ZHxiFWMPd/0/redacted/support/redacted/.m2/repository/org/flywaydb/flyway-core/11.3.4/flyway-core-11.3.4.jar(/org/flywaydb/core/Flyway.class)
[ERROR]     class file has wrong version 61.0, should be 55.0
[ERROR]     Please remove or make sure it appears in the correct subdirectory of the classpath.
[ERROR] /builds/ZHxiFWMPd/0/redacted/support/redacted/src/main/java/redacted/redacted/redacted/redacted/config/FlywayMigrationStrategyImpl.java:[14,25] cannot find symbol
[ERROR]   symbol:   class Flyway
[ERROR]   location: class redacted.redacted.redacted.edge.config.FlywayMigrationStrategyImpl
[ERROR] -> [Help 1]

It seems the error is stemming from the flyway class below:

package redacted.redacted.redacted.redacted.config;

import org.flywaydb.core.Flyway;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.flyway.FlywayMigrationStrategy;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

/**
 * Custom class to allow Flyway >= 7.x.x to work correctly with Spring Boot 2.3.x Note: This should
 * be updated if we ever update Spring Boot to a version that supports Flyway >= 7.x.x
 */
@Component
public class FlywayMigrationStrategyImpl implements FlywayMigrationStrategy {
    @Override
    public void migrate(Flyway flyway) {
        flyway.migrate();
    }
}

Any idea of how to update the class to get it to compile? The only other problem I can think is there is a problem with the class path.
